dialogues: ...Bryant Gumbel hosted CBS-TV's Early Show from 1999 to 2002.
The long front ruffle was added to make dining impossible...
Have you noticed that the bike in Jerry's apartment has changed?
"The Puffy Shirt" was first read by the show's cast...
...she set out to make the most uncomfortable...
...and free from wrinkles, hair or blemishes.
The character of Leslie returned...
For a brief time in the fifth season...
Hand-modeling agencies generally seek...
...from The Wizard of Oz...
koreanHints: 1. 식사를 불가능하게 만들려고 앞쪽에 긴 주름장식을 달았어.
2. 그녀는 가장 불편한 것을 만들어내기로 마음먹었어.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- set out to : 어떤 일을 하기로 마음먹고 착수하다, 의도적으로 시작하다. 단순히 try보다 강한 의지와 계획성을 담은 표현
- make something impossible : ~을 불가능하게 만들다. make + 목적어 + 형용사 구조로 결과 상태를 표현
- free from : ~이 없는, ~으로부터 자유로운. without보다 더 강조하는 뉘앙스

dialogues: takes a lap around the locker room,
while I was being stalled by that man!
and then when the tow truck guy shows up
Oh, you seem relaxed. I should stop.
I have picked up a few phrases
- Grandpa? - Oh, geez.
Okay, hurry, because he takes a picture of her
We had that huge cookie,
you're definitely gonna sign it, right?
every day at the same time
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- You seem + 형용사: ~해 보이네 (관찰한 것을 부드럽게 표현할 때. You look보다 약간 더 조심스러운 느낌)
- I should stop: 그만해야겠다 (상대 반응을 보고 자신의 행동을 스스로 제지할 때 쓰는 자연스러운 표현)
- at the same time: 같은 시간에 (every day와 함께 쓰여 규칙적인 습관을 강조)
- you're definitely gonna ~, right?: 확실히 ~할 거지, 그렇지? (상대의 동의나 확답을 구하면서도 압박하는 뉘앙스)
